selected_question.name: late_repair90_portfolio_ledger_source_link_exemplar_no_order_review
selected_question.mechanism_question: Can condition-level portfolio_risk_adjusted_nonnegative buckets, source-link transition fields, and residual-tail exemplars jointly identify a sample-preserving, non-price residual-risk control that was invisible to complete-set buffer/cap variants?

why_this_is_not_the_frozen_exact_shadow.new_question_intersection_not_old_promot: The question is whether risk-adjusted-negative condition buckets intersect with action-level residual source exemplars in a way that can select a future local verifier. It does not re-run the old shadow as promotion evidence.

bounded_safety_preflight_if_later_approv: Confirm no active xuan-research shadow runner before start.
Confirm shared-ingress read-only client prerequisites exist: broker manifest, market.sock, chainlink.sock, local_price.sock, and fresh heartbeat.
Confirm root disk and inode usage are safe.
Copy only current tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py into an isolated run directory.
Do not repo sync/build, do not run service/systemd controls, do not modify shared-ingress/broker/env/live paths, and do not send orders/cancels/redeems.

keep_requires: source-link transition scorer aggregate parity pass
risk-adjusted-negative portfolio condition residual_cost share is concentrated enough to nominate one local verifier target without summary-only removal
unknown_or_tradeoff_if: pair economics are positive but sample/risk budgets fail
portfolio risk buckets and residual-tail exemplars are complete but do not identify a sample-preserving non-price mechanism
risk-adjusted-negative conditions are broad or overlap profitable pair context too strongly
discard_if: residual risk remains broad across portfolio/source-link/exemplar intersections
the only apparent fix is summary-only removal, static side/offset cutoff, price/cap family, cooldown/admission cap, fill-to-balance revival, or broad replay search
any result is framed as private truth, canary, deployable, or promotion evidence
blocked_only_if: allowlisted artifacts are corrupt or missing

research_ranking.label: KEEP_PORTFOLIO_LEDGER_SOURCE_LINK_DIAGNOSTIC_SHADOW_QUESTION_SELECTED
evidence_basis: public-profile paired-inventory local verifier kept 95.19% seed actions and reduced residual cost rate 46.63%
default-off portfolio-ledger diagnostic fields and smoke are ready
previous exact portfolio-ledger shadow failed risk budget, so the next question must add source-link and residual-tail exemplar intersections before any new mechanism claim

next_executable_action: Wait for exact main-thread approval before any SSH/remote start. If not approved, continue local-only by drafting a scorer/spec for portfolio-ledger/source-link/exemplar intersection using existing pulled summaries; do not start another shadow from heartbeat alone.
